active.consequence: Brother Aldric makes his plea for help investigating the Cloakwood disappearances
A wounded merchant stumbles into the inn, sole survivor of a bandit attack, with disturbing news
Relief patrol may notice cage door ajar or other staging issues - could trigger early pursuit
The Watcher Beyond the Gate has noticed Tandy. The halfling who claimed to be a dark god now carries a piece of true darkness. Dreams will come.
The Harpers will learn of Tandy's betrayal and fall to darkness. Vaylen was one of their agents. They do not forget.
Word spreads of the massacre at the Watcher's Ring. The Friendly Arm Inn learns of Bentley's death. Fear grips the Coast Way.
Durnan's logging camp spreads word of the Voice of the Watcher passing through at dawn. Terror ripples along the Coast Way.
Flaming Fist launches citywide hunt for 'demon halfling and cultists' after Basilisk Gate incident. Patrols doubled, gates watched, reward offered.
The five guards at Basilisk Gate - three will recover from fear, two may be permanently maddened. Their testimonies will spread through the Fist.

resolved.consequence: Silaren Duskwood approaches the party with urgent news about the bandit attacks
Tandy and Silaren depart for Cloakwood Edge to track bandits. Vaylen may accompany them.
The grumpy dwarf at the Friendly Arm Inn remembers Tandy poorly - may cause trouble if they return
resolved.trigger: next visit to Friendly Arm Inn

resolved.consequence: Flaming Fist patrol that avoided Tandy's cult on the Coast Way will report the sighting to their superiors in Baldur's Gate.
